macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Falls 2% for Fifth Straight Weekly Loss Amid Mideast Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 declined 2% last week, marking its first five consecutive weekly losses since 2022, while U.S. 10-year Treasury yields rose to 4.43% and Brent crude hit $112 per barrel due to Middle East conflict escalation.

items.title: US Announces Blockade of Iranian Ports in Strait of Hormuz, Boosting Energy Exports
items.summary: President Trump declared the U.S. will not allow Iran to blackmail the world amid its port blockade, providing geopolitical leverage for rising U.S. oil exports as global supply shifts.

items.title: Wall Street Slides as Oil Prices Surge Over $100 on US-Iran Port Threats
items.summary: Wall Street followed global markets lower with oil prices exceeding $100 per barrel again, as the U.S. prepares to blockade Iranian ports and the Strait of Hormuz where shipping remains stalled.

items.title: Oil Prices Rise After US Confirms Iranian Port Blockade Starting Monday
items.summary: Early market trading saw oil prices climb following the U.S. announcement of a blockade on Iranian ports beginning Monday, exacerbating global energy supply disruptions.

items.title: Mideast Conflict Fuels Energy Security Investments and AI Power Demand
items.summary: The Middle East shock is intensifying government efforts for energy supply security and resilient supply chains, amplified by AI-driven power demand accelerating infrastructure investments.

items.title: Fed Chair Powell Speech Scheduled Amid Key US Economic Data Releases
items.summary: Upcoming events include Fed Chair Powell's speech at 02:30 PM, alongside Dallas Fed Manufacturing Index, ADP Employment Change, and Retail Sales data, signaling focus on labor market resilience.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Faces Selling Pressure Above $70K Amid Trump-Iran Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin encounters heavy selling above $70,000 with $20M/hour in profit-taking, exacerbated by collapsed Islamabad peace talks, Iran's Strait of Hormuz closure, and Trump's naval blockade order on Iranian ports.

items.title: Iran Demands Bitcoin for Strait of Hormuz Toll Payments
items.summary: Amid escalating geopolitical tensions, Iran requires Bitcoin payments for access to the Strait of Hormuz, contributing to oil price surges and Bitcoin market pressure.

items.title: WLFI and Justin Sun Engage in $75M Loan Legal Dispute
items.summary: World Liberty Financial (WLFI) feud with Justin Sun escalates into a legal battle over a $75M loan, token blacklisting, and credibility issues for crypto's institutional adoption.

items.title: Bitcoin Shows Micro Bullish Breakout Potential to $80K
items.summary: Despite macro crash risks, Bitcoin holds key support at $60K-$64K, with potential short-term surge to $80,000; altcoins like ETH near $2,000 trendline, SOL eyeing $80, XRP bull flag to $1.55.
items.source: YouTube - Bitcoin: The Micro Breakout vs. The Macro Crash

items.title: Crypto Market Sees 87% Jump in 24-Hour Liquidations to $525M
items.summary: 24-hour trading volume up 38%, liquidations surge 87% to $525M, driven by Bitcoin bounce and Trump statement, with breakout above 71,700 level retested.
items.source: YouTube - Bitcoin (BTC): Everyone Is Lying To You

items.title: Hackers Mint 1 Billion DOT on Ethereum Mainnet via Bridge Exploit
items.summary: Hackers exploited a bridge to mint and sell 1 billion DOT tokens on Ethereum mainnet, highlighting ongoing security vulnerabilities in blockchain bridges.

items.title: JP Morgan Begins Accepting Bitcoin as Collateral
items.summary: JP Morgan announces acceptance of Bitcoin as collateral, signaling growing institutional integration amid discussions on declining U.S. dollar reserve status.

items.title: Michael Saylor's MicroStrategy Purchases $1 Billion in Bitcoin
items.summary: MicroStrategy, led by Michael Saylor, bought $1 billion worth of Bitcoin last week, contributing to recent price action amid shifting market dynamics.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: AI Revolution in Mathematics Accelerates Proof Discoveries
items.summary: AI tools like ChatGPT are enabling mathematicians to prove new results rapidly, with examples including a proof of Nesterov's method convergence achieved in days using iterative prompting. Experts predict substantial AI-assisted discoveries with upcoming model improvements.

items.title: AWS Session Highlights Responsible AI for Autonomous Agents
items.summary: A new AWS event on April 13 discusses securing AI systems evolving into autonomous agents, addressing risks like prompt injection, data leakage, and model manipulation while promoting governance and compliance strategies.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Battlefield 6 Launches October 10 with Day-One Patch Featuring 200 Changes
items.summary: Battlefield 6 release times have been revealed for its October 10 launch, accompanied by a massive day-one patch with over 200 fixes and changes. The game delivers chaotic large-scale multiplayer and marks a return to form for the series.

items.title: Final Fantasy VII, VIII, and IX Physical Releases Coming to Nintendo Switch in America on December 9
items.summary: The Final Fantasy VII + VIII Remastered: Twin Pack and Final Fantasy IX physical editions for Nintendo Switch launch December 9 in America.

items.title: Super Mario Galaxy Movie Achieves Highest-Grossing Premiere of 2026
items.summary: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie had the highest-grossing premiere of 2026, tracking slightly behind its predecessor, The Super Mario Bros. Movie.

items.title: First Three Resident Evil Titles and Breath of Fire IV Now Available on Steam
items.summary: The original versions of Resident Evil 1-3 and Breath of Fire IV are now playable on PC via Steam.

items.title: Nintendo Releases Update 20.1.1 for Original Switch Ahead of Switch 2 Launch
items.summary: Nintendo issued system update 20.1.1 for the original Switch, fixing issues just days before the Nintendo Switch 2 launches on June 5.

items.title: Thick As Thieves Immersive Sim Shifts to Single-Player and Co-Op, Drops PvPvE
items.summary: Developer Otherside Entertainment abandons PvPvE mode for the immersive sim heist game Thick As Thieves to focus solely on single-player and co-op.

items.title: All Nintendo Switch 2 Games Confirmed and Rumored So Far
items.summary: A gallery details all confirmed and rumored games for the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
